item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya berpendapat bahwa pendekatan Indonesia yang mengutamakan kepentingan sosial tidak selalu melanggar hak individu, karena sistem kita mencoba menjaga keseimbangan antara dua hal.

notes: Agent A opens with clear agreement that social interests are often prioritized over individual rights, then shifts by turn 3 toward a balance frame and ends near a moderated society-leaning position. Agent B remains individual-rights-leaning throughout, while acknowledging that U.S. law can consider broader social impacts.
